Package it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.Socket.messages

package it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.Socket.messages
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.Socket
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AddPlayerMessage
    Socket message sent by a client to join the current Mesos lobby.
    askForRankMessage
    Socket message that requests the global leaderboard from the server for the specified player count.
    CreateGameMessage
    Client-to-server Socket message that requests creation of a new game lobby.
    JoinGameLoadedMessage
    Socket message sent by a reconnecting player to join a game being loaded.
    LoadGameMessage
    Socket message sent by the first reconnecting player to load a saved game.
    PingMessage
    Client-to-server heartbeat message.
    PlacingPlayerMessage
    Client-to-server Socket message that requests a totem placement on an offer tile.
    PlayerDoNothingMessage
    Client-to-server Socket message requesting that the player skip their turn (used when no valid market action is available).
    SelectCardFromBottomListMessage
    Client-to-server Socket message requesting that a card be drawn from the bottom market row.
    SelectCardFromTopListMessage
    Client-to-server Socket message requesting that a card be drawn from the top market row.
    SelectExtraCardMessage
    Client-to-server Socket message requesting an extra card draw triggered by the draw-one-more building effect.
    SkipExtraDrawMessage
    Client-to-server Socket message requesting that the player skip the extra draw granted by the draw-one-more building effect without selecting any card.
